nodes.label: Azure DevOps multiline field format (HTML vs Markdown) varies per work item, not by type
nodes.source_file: wiki/platforms/Azure DevOps multiline field format (HTML vs Markdown) varies per work item, not by type.md
nodes.rationale: Rendering format for multiline fields (Description, AcceptanceCriteria) is stored per-work-item in the response's multilineFieldsFormat map, not fixed by work item type or process template, so writing the wrong syntax silently renders wrong instead of erroring. A later session found a prior claim (backtick-wrapped angle brackets get stripped) was contradicted by contrary evidence — flagged as an unresolved conflict needing per-field verification.

edges.source_file: wiki/platforms/Azure DevOps multiline field format (HTML vs Markdown) varies per work item, not by type.md
